2605.04243.title: Temporal Reasoning Is Not the Bottleneck: A Probabilistic Inconsistency Framework for Neuro-Symbolic QA
2605.04243.paper_summary: Despite significant advances, large language models (LLMs) continue to exhibit brittle performance on complex temporal reasoning tasks. This failure mode is widely attributed to inherent deficits in autoregressive logical deduction. In this paper, we challenge this prevailing narrative, demonstrating that temporal reasoning is not the fundamental bottleneck; rather, the locus of failure lies in unstructured text-to-event representation. We introduce a novel neuro-symbolic question-answering framework governed by a Probabilistic Inconsistency Signal (PIS) that explicitly isolates perceptual errors from reasoning failures. By lifting unstructured text into explicit event graphs and interval constraints, our architecture strictly decouples semantic extraction from a symbolic reasoning engine. To robustly detect structural breaks, the PIS elegantly unifies symbolic credal intervals with epistemic neural uncertainty extracted via Evidential Deep Learning on LLM hidden states. Empirical evaluations reveal a striking paradigm shift: when provided with correct structural representations, our system's explicit proof traces achieve perfect 1.0 accuracy (4000/4000) and strictly zero false positives/negatives on temporal arithmetic benchmarks. On broader, noise-injected QA settings, the framework maintains a competitive 75.1\% accuracy while enabling deterministic, step-level failure localization. Ultimately, by isolating the representation bottleneck from the reasoning substrate, this work reframes temporal QA from an algorithmic reasoning challenge to a structural alignment problem, charting a verifiable path forward for reliable neuro-symbolic AI.
2605.04243.paper_summary_zh: 儘管取得了重大進展，大型語言模型（LLMs）在複雜的時間推理任務上仍然表現脆弱。這種失敗模式普遍被歸因於自回歸邏輯推理中的固有缺陷。在本文中，我們挑戰這一主流觀點，證明時間推理並不是根本的瓶頸；相反，失敗的根源在於非結構化的文本到事件的表示。我們引入了一個新穎的神經符號問答框架，該框架由一個概率不一致信號（PIS）主導，該信號明確地將感知錯誤與推理失敗隔離開來。通過將非結構化文本提升為明確的事件圖和區間約束，我們的架構嚴格地將語義提取與符號推理引擎解耦。為了穩健地檢測結構性斷裂，PIS優雅地將符號信念區間與通過證據深度學習從LLM隱藏狀態中提取的認知神經不確定性統一起來。實證評估揭示了一個驚人的範式轉變：當提供正確的結構表示時，我們系統的明確證明追蹤達到完美的1.0準確率（4000/4000），並在時間算術基準上嚴格為零的假陽性/假陰性。在更廣泛的噪音注入問答設置中，該框架保持了75.1\%的競爭性準確率，同時實現確定性的逐步失敗定位。最終，通過將表示瓶頸與推理基礎隔離，這項工作將時間問答重新框架為一個結構對齊問題，而不是算法推理挑戰，為可靠的神經符號人工智慧描繪了一條可驗證的前進道路。
2605.04243.author: Tran Quang Liem et.al.
